approval.allowance.name: approval.allowance
approval.allowance.description: Inspect a token allowance: surfaces raw value, unlimited-allowance flag, and coverage of a requested amount.

allowance.description: Current allowance (uint256 string). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction (uint256 string).

approval.cover_inputs.name: approval.cover_inputs
approval.cover_inputs.description: Whether the token allowance covers the requested input amount.

allowances_cover_inputs.description: Caller-supplied override; takes precedence when present.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction.

clock.now.name: clock.now
clock.now.description: Current Unix timestamp (seconds) from the daemon's clock.
clock.now.stateDependency: none (host wall clock, not wallet state)

oracle.effective_rate_bps.name: oracle.effective_rate_bps
oracle.effective_rate_bps.description: Effective rate of a swap vs the oracle's mid-market price, expressed in basis points (negative = unfavourable).
oracle.effective_rate_bps.stateDependency: external price feed (oracle mid-market); no wallet-state read

oracle.usd_value.name: oracle.usd_value
oracle.usd_value.description: Convert a token amount to its USD valuation via a price oracle.
oracle.usd_value.stateDependency: external price feed (coingecko/chainlink); under ADR-009 this resolves to the DIRECT read of token_holdings.price_value (LiveField) instead of a live oracle call

source.description: Which price source to query. `coingecko` is HTTP-based and works out of the box; `chainlink` reads on-chain feeds and needs POLICY_RPC_CHAIN_RPCS configured per chain.

portfolio.balance.name: portfolio.balance
portfolio.balance.description: Wallet balance of a specific token.

portfolio.input_fraction_bps.name: portfolio.input_fraction_bps
portfolio.input_fraction_bps.description: Fraction of the wallet's portfolio (denominated in the input asset) the transaction is spending, in basis points.

scopeball.evaluate_v3.name: scopeball.evaluate_v3
scopeball.evaluate_v3.description: Phase 5D mock — echo (envelopes, eval_context, wallet_id) back as policyRequest.actions with empty state_before / deltas / state_after. Real implementation arrives in Phase 6 (reducer + state sync).
scopeball.evaluate_v3.stateDependency: whole-wallet state (holdings/approvals/positions) folded through the reducer to produce State₂ (mock today; Phase 6 wires the real reducer)

wallet_id.description: WalletId (address + chains). Carried verbatim by the mock; Phase 6 will key state persistence off this.

envelopes.description: List of caller-built Action envelopes (typed PDF FSM ActionBody). The mock echoes these into policyRequest.actions.

stat_window.snapshot.name: stat_window.snapshot
stat_window.snapshot.description: Rolling-window snapshot of recent on-chain activity for the wallet.
stat_window.snapshot.stateDependency: cross-request activity history ([H]); not in the state DB today (only state_deltas is partial)

stat_window.swap_stats.name: stat_window.swap_stats
stat_window.swap_stats.description: Per-action stats over a sliding 24h window (volume + count).
stat_window.swap_stats.stateDependency: cross-request swap history over a 24h window ([H]); not in the state DB today

valuation.asset_usd.name: valuation.asset_usd
valuation.asset_usd.description: USD valuation of a single asset position: token amount × DB price. Replaces the live oracle.usd_value call with a DIRECT read of the refrigerated LiveField (ADR-009).

position.health_factor_after.name: position.health_factor_after
position.health_factor_after.description: Health factor of a lending position AFTER virtually applying the proposed borrow/withdraw (State₂). Reducer recomputes from refrigerated collaterals/debts/liquidation_threshold + price. Drives AAVE-01 (T3).

action.description: The proposed borrow/withdraw — applied via the reducer to produce State₂ before recomputing HF. Without it the method cannot compute the AFTER value.

perp.notional_to_collateral.name: perp.notional_to_collateral
perp.notional_to_collateral.description: Ratio of the proposed order's notional (size × markPrice) to the account's total collateral USD. SELF-VERIFY: on OpenPosition both inputs live in the action's live_inputs (size, markPrice, userAccountState.totalCollateralUsd) → this is a DERIVED read, not a whole-wallet fold. A cross-position collateral fold is a separate variant. Drives PERP-03.

action.description: The proposed perp order: size × markPrice = notional; userAccountState = collateral denominator.

portfolio.group_pct.name: portfolio.group_pct
portfolio.group_pct.description: Whole-wallet fold: percentage of total portfolio USD held in a token/category group AFTER the proposed action (State₂). PortfolioAggregate — gated on ADR-010 (T2). Output flattens per-group scalars into context fields.

group_axis.description: How holdings are grouped to form the share's denominator/numerator.

asset.description: The group key being measured (e.g. the acquired token for group_axis=token).

basis.description: state1 = current holdings; state2 = after the action is applied via the reducer.
